'''''Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience'': Prima Official Game Guide''' was a strategy guide published by [[Prima Games]] for [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], as well as its expansions, ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''.

{{Book-stub}}
